reconfigure.title: eGauge Pro
reconfigure.description: Update the connection details for this eGauge. The device serial must still match.

error.invalid_host: Invalid host — use a bare hostname or IP, no protocol or port

abort.wrong_device: Those credentials are for a different eGauge (serial number mismatch). Reconfigure must point at the same device.

manual.title: Inverted registers
manual.description: Select registers whose sign should be flipped (e.g. generation vs consumption). Type to filter; selected registers show as removable chips.

auto_detect.title: Auto-detected inverted registers
auto_detect.description: Power registers currently reading negative are pre-selected (along with your existing choices), EXCLUDING net/bidirectional registers you've listed under "exclude from energy counters" — those legitimately swing sign (e.g. solar at night) and shouldn't be auto-inverted. Review and confirm — adjust the chips as needed.

energy_counters.title: Exclude registers from energy counters
energy_counters.description: Select power registers to EXCLUDE from the cumulative energy (kWh) counters. Net/bidirectional registers (net grid, net solar, batteries, total usage) oscillate, which is invalid for an increasing energy total — exclude those. Leave empty for the default (every power register gets a counter). Does not affect instantaneous power sensors.

data.skip_energy_counters: Registers to exclude from energy counters
